items.claim: Paddy Pimblett leaves his chin exposed when striking.
items.quote: Paddy puts his chin on a platter.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's takedown entries are technically poor.
items.quote: Paddy's takedown entries look like a grandma shooting a takedown.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis frequently exposes his neck during takedown entries.
items.quote: BSD's takedown entries, he just It's like he's purposely giving up his neck, like he wants to get guillotined.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's striking style is highly dependent on freshness and explosiveness.
items.quote: His fight style is reliant on how fresh he is because the second he's not fresh the knockout power goes away

items.claim: Conor McGregor relies on a limited set of repetitive striking combinations.
items.quote: Conor McGregor, when you look at his striking style, he actually has like about two, three combos that he goes to a lot.

items.claim: Max Holloway's low kicks will be effective against Conor McGregor because McGregor is heavy on his front leg and struggles to check kicks.
items.quote: that's going to be a problem for Conor McGregor uh cuz Conor's so heavy on that front leg and Conor actually doesn't do a great job checking it.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is not proficient at switching stances.
items.quote: forcing him to switch stance is already a problem cuz he's not that great at switch stance.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff since his last loss to Dustin Poirier.
items.quote: Conor McGregor taking 5 years off after Conor McGregor lost to Dustin Poirier

items.claim: Max Holloway will finish Conor McGregor in the second round.
items.quote: I got Max Holloway by knockout in the second round.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker and Nikita Krylov will not finish the fight in the first half of the first round.
items.quote: I reckon they're going to go over one and a half.
